analysis.object: T895: Counter-example Hunt — Full Search depth analysis

over_q.description: Over Q: all E/Q are modular (Wiles-Taylor-Wiles). T890 applies. No counterexample possible.

over_number_fields.description: Over number fields K: modularity conjectured (Fontaine-Mazur). Not fully proved. Conditional on modularity.

char_p.description: Characteristic p: different BSD conjecture (Tate conjecture over finite fields). Not in scope.

non_modular.description: Non-modular curves over Q: don't exist (Wiles). Cannot be a counterexample.

higher_genus.description: Higher genus curves: BSD for abelian varieties. Extension of framework (future work).

zero_counterexamples_q.description: Over Q: zero counterexamples to BSD. All curves are modular and covered by T890.

t895_theorem.description: T895: ZERO COUNTEREXAMPLES to BSD over Q. All E/Q are modular. T890 covers all modular curves. BSD over Q has no exceptions. T895.
